description: P2 Admin API routes: Advanced reporting (cancelled orders, returns reports, collections reports), audit log, subcategory management, customer feedback/reviews, WhatsApp log, delivery pricing slabs, rewards config.
steps: Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/reports/cancelled/route.ts - GET returns cancelled orders report with date range. Count cancelled orders, aggregate by reason, total refund amounts.
Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/reports/returns/route.ts - GET returns return requests report. Aggregate by status, calculate total refund amounts, items returned count.
Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/reports/collections/route.ts - GET returns delivery collections report. Aggregate by partner, date range, show cash/UPI breakdown, reconciliation status.

Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/admin/audit-log/route.ts - GET returns paginated audit log entries. Support filters: actorId, action, targetType, date range. Use authenticateMobileRequest with ADMIN/OWNER roles.
Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/admin/subcategories/route.ts - GET returns subcategories (optionally filtered by categoryId). POST creates a new subcategory.
Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/admin/subcategories/[id]/route.ts - PATCH updates subcategory. DELETE removes subcategory.
Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/admin/reviews/route.ts - GET returns all product reviews, paginated. Support filters by rating, productId. Include user name and product name.
Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/admin/whatsapp-log/route.ts - GET returns WhatsApp message log, paginated. Show phone, template, status, orderId, createdAt.
Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/admin/delivery-slabs/route.ts - GET returns delivery fee slabs. POST creates a slab. PATCH updates a slab. Follow DeliveryFeeSlab model.
Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/admin/delivery-slabs/[id]/route.ts - PATCH updates a delivery fee slab. DELETE removes it.
Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/admin/rewards/route.ts - GET returns loyalty configuration (from constants or settings). PATCH updates loyalty config if stored in settings.
Create apps/web/app/api/mobile/v1/admin/feedback/route.ts - GET returns order feedback entries with ratings and comments. Supports pagination.
acceptance_criteria: All P2 routes exist and use authenticateMobileRequest
Reports endpoints return aggregated data with proper date filtering
Audit log supports pagination and filtering
All CRUD endpoints follow consistent patterns
